text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Spring Fan Appreciation Festival is just around the corner! To thank everyone for their support, the horsegirls put on a variety of games and events for their fans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Buena Vista, who always says she wants to give something back to the people cheering her on, is naturally eager to participate. The event she chose was…

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text: Human Pyramid Battle!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text: Teams of four, three players form the base while one rider stands at the top! The riders battle to snatch each other's headbands in this hugely popular event!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text: And one of this year's biggest stars is… Buena Vistaaaaaa!!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Waaaaaaaaaahh!!!!)

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text: Just listen to that applause! A media darling who's taking the world by storm! The horsegirl racing toward the very pinnacle of her generation!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I'm not used to this event, but I'll give it everything I've got! I hope you'll cheer just as loudly as you do during my races!

text_block_list.name: Unicarize
text_block_list.text: Buena Vista. Thank you for accepting my invitation.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: The pleasure's all mine! I'm so happy I get to be on a team with all of you♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Buena's teammates are Unicarize, At the Crest, and Shindou Runrun. The same girls who made their make debut alongside her.

text_block_list.name: At the Crest
text_block_list.text: Sansha Sangyo couldn't make it because she's still recovering from an injury… but she came to cheer us on.

text_block_list.name: Shindou Runrun
text_block_list.text: For our rider… there could be no one more fitting than you, the star of the moment. Now then, let us ride to victory.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Okay! Let's have some fun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Woooooooooaahhhh…!!!!)

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text: And here's the other competitor everyone's been waiting for… Vodkaaaaaaa!!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text: The unconventional queen who claimed victory in last year's Japan Cup now steps onto the Human Pyramid battlefield!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hah! You guys get your engines fired up yet!?

text_block_list.name: Vodka's Teammate
text_block_list.text: We're not guys, but… if Vodka's our rider, we've got this. Let's take 'em head-on!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: No way…! We're actually getting Buena Vista versus Vodka!?

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: I've been dying to see this! Who's the strongest queen!? This is gonna be awesome!!
choice_data_list: (The atmosphere feels just like a race…)
(The atmosphere feels just like a race…)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Even trying to stay objective, I can't help getting swept up in the excitement. Vodka and Buena Vista are finally facing each other…

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text: And the Human Pyramid Battle begins! A contest demanding teamwork, strength, and sheer power…!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: All right! Hit 'em hard and take 'em down! We're… the wild bunch!!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text: Vodka's team makes the first move! An all-out offensive! They're knocking team after team out of the competition!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Unicarize! Lean forward just a little!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: At the Crest! Shindou Runrun too! Get ready to accelerate!

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Got it!!!!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text: Meanwhile, Buena Vista's team had a slower start, but thanks to flawless teamwork, they're steadily cutting down the competition as well!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text: Vodka Team! Buena Vista Team! Vodka Team! Buena Vista Team! The rest of the field has been eliminated! …It's down to these two powerhouses!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Those two unstoppable teams… finally stand face to face.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Vodka…!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: …Yo, Buena. I knew we'd have to settle this sooner or later.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I won't leave you a single opening. Come at me with everything you've got!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Vodka… I really do admire you.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: …Huh?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: You're so cool… So strong… You never let convention hold you back.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: That's exactly why… I want to surpass you. So let me face you with everything I've got!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: …Heh. All right. If you're that serious… then I'll give you everything I've got too!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Alright then… here I come!

text_block_list.name: Buena & Vodka
text_block_list.text:
―Haaahhh!!
―Raaaahhh!!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The two human pyramids charge toward one another. The outcome is…

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text: What an incredible showdown that sent the fans into a frenzy! The winner is… Vodka! Vodka holds off the next generation!!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Vodka slipped past Buena at the last possible instant.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: …Not bad. You've gotten pretty good.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …I'm sorry, everyone. If only I'd thought our strategy through a little more…

text_block_list.name: Shindou Runrun
text_block_list.text: No, no. That final dodge was simply a testament to Vodka's perseverance.

text_block_list.name: At the Crest
text_block_list.text: Wow, that was amazing… But hey, we gave them a real fight! Second place isn't bad at all! We did great!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Buena Vistaaa!! Great job! You were amazing!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Everyone… thank you so much for cheering us on…!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Although her team fell just short of victory… Buena Vista's wholehearted effort only won over even more fans.

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text: Buena Vista!! It's Buena Vista!! She breaks through Vodka's seemingly impenetrable defense! A perfectly timed strike! She's done it!!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Gaaah!! You got me!!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Dang it… If I'd moved just a tenth of a second sooner…!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Vodka!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Buena… You're unbelievable. You really came charging straight at me.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Weren't you scared? Going all out against me like that…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Scared? Of course not. When you're up against someone like Vodka, it's actually scarier to hold back!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: …Heh. I get it now.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Listen, Buena. I lost today… but when the real race comes, I won't let you pass me!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Absolutely! I'm looking forward to it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Waaaaah…!!)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Everyone…! Thank you so much for cheering on "Team Glorious Make Debut"!
choice_data_list: (That sounded like the name of an old idol group…)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bathed in thunderous applause… Buena Vista leaves the audience thoroughly satisfied. And her popularity only continues to grow.
